code:
import io
import string

fn byte_of(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn is_digit(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b >= 48 and b <= 57
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut have = false
  mut best = 0
  mut best_abs = 0
  while i < n
    while i < n and is_ws(byte_of(line, i))
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i < n
      mut sign = 1
      let b = byte_of(line, i)
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut val = 0
      while i < n and is_digit(byte_of(line, i))
        val = val * 10 + (byte_of(line, i) - 48)
        i = i + 1
      end
      let signed = val * sign
      mut abs_v = signed
      if abs_v < 0
        abs_v = -abs_v
      end
      if not have or abs_v < best_abs
        best = signed
        best_abs = abs_v
        have = true
      end
    end
  end
  println("min_abs=#{best}")
end
